title: Tangy Crumbly Mediterranean Semolina Crumble
description: A comforting Polish dish featuring tangy marinated semolina flour baked into a crumbly topping that complements grilled meats or as a standalone dessert.
instructions: Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). In a mixing bowl, combine semolina flour, ground almonds, orange juice concentrate, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt. Stir until well combined.
Gradually add softened butter and sugar while stirring until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. The texture should be crumbly but hold together when pressed between fingers.
Transfer the crumble mixture to a lightly greased 9x9 inch pan. Smooth the top with the back of a spoon for an even layer.
Bake in preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown and crisp on top, stirring every 10 minutes to prevent burning.
Cool completely before serving as a dessert. Store leftovers in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days.
